vocab.meaning: chuyến tham quan xuyên quốc gia/đi xa
vocab.example: I vividly remember embarking on a cross-country excursion with my parents every summer break.
I spent hours pressed against the window, mesmerized by the captivating vistas of the countryside.

vocab.meaning: sự phấn khích không kiềm chế được
vocab.example: Whenever my dad started the engine, a wave of unbridled excitement would wash over me.
The rear passenger seat was my personal sanctuary where I could read or nap during long hauls.

vocab.meaning: tương tác với người thân/gia đình
vocab.example: Car trips were rare opportunities to interact with kin and share stories without the distraction of television.

vocab.meaning: hành trình đường bộ/việc du hành
vocab.example: The slow pace of wayfare allowed us to appreciate the subtle changes in the landscape.

vocab.meaning: tính chất ngồi yên một chỗ
vocab.example: I sometimes struggled with the sedentary nature of car travel, as I was quite a restless child.
The perpetual motion of the car often acted as a lullaby, putting me to sleep within minutes.
Stopping at greasy roadside diners was a quintessential experience of our family road trips.
It was fascinating to watch different towns and cultures unfold before my eyes through a car window.
